family_checks.description: For each required variant, resolve a concrete download target OR record not_published with evidence.
family_checks.pass_condition: For every required variant: (resolved.download_url exists) OR (resolved.status == 'not_published' AND resolved.evidence_ref exists).
family_checks.failure_message: Missing resolvable source for one or more required variants without not_published evidence.

family_checks.description: Download archives and ensure GDAL/OGR can read at least one layer; store checksum and file inventory.
family_checks.pass_condition: For each resolved download_url: download_status == 'ok' AND gdal_readable == true AND sha256 exists.
family_checks.failure_message: Download failed, archive unreadable, or checksum missing.

family_checks.description: Ingest each dataset/variant into PostGIS with expected schema/table naming; ensure geom column and target SRID.
family_checks.pass_condition: For each table: ingest_status == 'ok' AND geom_column_exists == true AND srid == target_srid.
family_checks.failure_message: Ingestion failed or geometry column/SRID not as expected.
outputs: ingestions[{family_id}][{variant}] = {schema, table, ingest_status, geom_column_exists, srid, row_count}

family_checks.description: Validate expected code/name fields exist (using regex patterns if specified).
Geography code must be unique within each {family_id, variant, vintage} table.

sql_templates.duplicate_check: SELECT COUNT(*) AS dupes FROM (SELECT {code_col}, COUNT(*) c FROM {schema}.{table} GROUP BY {code_col} HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) t;

family_checks.description: All geometries must be valid, or repaired with repair counts logged.
family_checks.failure_message: Invalid geometries remain after optional repair.

sql_templates.invalid_count: SELECT COUNT(*) AS invalids FROM {schema}.{table} WHERE NOT ST_IsValid(geom);

family_checks.description: Each table must meet its minimum expected row count threshold.
family_checks.failure_message: Row count below minimum threshold (likely wrong layer, wrong geography, or incomplete ingest).

family_checks.description: All required variants must be present unless explicitly not_published with evidence.
family_checks.pass_condition: For each required variant: (ingest_status == 'ok') OR (resolved.status == 'not_published' AND evidence_ref exists).
family_checks.failure_message: Required variant missing without an authorised not_published record.

global_checks.description: A machine-readable run report must be produced with all required fields and per-family outcomes.
global_checks.pass_condition: run_report_exists == true AND required_fields_present == true AND all_family_ids_covered == true

status_evaluation.pass_when: All checks with severity == 'error' pass for all boundary_families AND global_checks pass.
